'''鈭歾-p-y''' ('''zapapaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:drive|drive]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-p-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:drive|drive]]
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-p-y
|-
! Lemma
| zapapaya
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizapay|thizapay]] || [[word:jizapay|jizapay]] || [[word:shizapay|shizapay]] || [[word:kizapay|kizapay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzapay|thuthuzapay]] || [[word:jujuzapay|jujuzapay]] || [[word:shushuzapay|shushuzapay]] || [[word:kukuzapay|kukuzapay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzapay|thuzapay]] || [[word:juzapay|juzapay]] || [[word:shuzapay|shuzapay]] || [[word:kuzapay|kuzapay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzapay|thuzapay]] || [[word:juzapay|juzapay]] || [[word:shuzapay|shuzapay]] || [[word:kuzapay|kuzapay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezapay|thezapay]] || [[word:jezapay|jezapay]] || [[word:shezapay|shezapay]] || [[word:kezapay|kezapay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozapay|thothozapay]] || [[word:jojozapay|jojozapay]] || [[word:shoshozapay|shoshozapay]] || [[word:kokozapay|kokozapay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozapay|thozapay]] || [[word:jozapay|jozapay]] || [[word:shozapay|shozapay]] || [[word:kozapay|kozapay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozapay|thozapay]] || [[word:jozapay|jozapay]] || [[word:shozapay|shozapay]] || [[word:kozapay|kozapay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zapay|th忙zapay]] || [[word:j忙zapay|j忙zapay]] || [[word:sh忙zapay|sh忙zapay]] || [[word:k忙zapay|k忙zapay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazapay|thathazapay]] || [[word:jajazapay|jajazapay]] || [[word:shashazapay|shashazapay]] || [[word:kakazapay|kakazapay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazapay|thazapay]] || [[word:jazapay|jazapay]] || [[word:shazapay|shazapay]] || [[word:kazapay|kazapay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazapay|thazapay]] || [[word:jazapay|jazapay]] || [[word:shazapay|shazapay]] || [[word:kazapay|kazapay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazapay|shazapay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazapay|goshazapay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazapay|gokishazapay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazapayn眉|shazapayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazapaynkn眉|goshazapaynkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapayn眉|gokishazapayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazapaysh毛|shazapaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazapaynksh毛|goshazapaynksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazapaysh毛|gokishazapaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapayro|shazapayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapaynkro|goshazapaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapayro|gokishazapayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapaymu|shazapaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapaynkmu|goshazapaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapaymu|gokishazapaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazapaysher|shazapaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazapaynksher|goshazapaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazapaysher|gokishazapaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazapayng|shazapayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazapaynkng|goshazapaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazapayng|gokishazapayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazapaya|shazapaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazapaynkya|goshazapaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazapaya|gokishazapaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazapayam|shazapayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazapaynkyam|goshazapaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazapayam|gokishazapayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazapayn眉sh毛|shazapayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazapaynkn眉sh毛|goshazapaynkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazapayn眉sh毛|gokishazapayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapayn眉ro|shazapayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapaynkn眉ro|goshazapaynkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapayn眉ro|gokishazapayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapayn眉mu|shazapayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapaynkn眉mu|goshazapaynkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapayn眉mu|gokishazapayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazapaysh毛n眉|shazapaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazapaynksh毛n眉|goshazapaynksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapaysh毛n眉|gokishazapaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapaysh毛ro|shazapaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapaynksh毛ro|goshazapaynksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapaysh毛ro|gokishazapaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapaysh毛mu|shazapaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapaynksh毛mu|goshazapaynksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapaysh毛mu|gokishazapaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazapayron眉|shazapayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazapaynkron眉|goshazapaynkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapayron眉|gokishazapayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazapayrosh毛|shazapayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazapaynkrosh毛|goshazapaynkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazapayrosh毛|gokishazapayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapayromu|shazapayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapaynkromu|goshazapaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapayromu|gokishazapayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazapaymun眉|shazapaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazapaynkmun眉|goshazapaynkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapaymun眉|gokishazapaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazapaymush毛|shazapaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazapaynkmush毛|goshazapaynkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazapaymush毛|gokishazapaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapaymuro|shazapaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapaynkmuro|goshazapaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapaymuro|gokishazapaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
